title: Unique Party 56741 - 14" Silver Foil Number 1 Balloon
features: THE BEST TREAT: Ready to build an amazing party? Let these decoration and accesories make a good impression! Your guests will love keeping all their foods and tasty treats on these tablewares and accesories.
PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASSION: These balloons can be used for Valentine's Day, birthdays, weddings, anniversaries and events, romantic love party balloons decorations.
GREAT ADD ON: Combine these with other party supplies or mix with printed and other solid tableware to personalize your party table and party. You can celebrate with a bang!
TOP QUALITY: Balloons are made with high quality foil, safe, non-toxic and odorless materials. The balloon surface is of uniform thickness after inflating the balloon.
SAFETY TIPS: Do not overfill the ball to avoid sunburn, overheating, sharp objects and excessive friction, which can be filled with air and helium. Need to prepare helium and air by yourself.
description: From the manufacturer Silver 14" Foil Number Balloons Be blown away with these 14" foil number balloons! Perfect for any birthday or anniversary, just select your numbers from 0 to 9 and give your celebration an instant lift!
